articles.title: Starmer accuses Musk of trying to whip up division over Henry Nowak murder

articles.title: Inquest to examine if police response contributed to Henry Nowak death
articles.description: A full inquest into Henry Nowak's death is scheduled for September 2027 in Winchester.

articles.title: Israel and Lebanon agree to implement ceasefire if Hezbollah stops attacks
articles.description: The countries reject "any attempt, by any state or non-state actor, to hold Lebanon's future hostage", the US says.

articles.title: 'Nothing left to chance' for Bayeux Tapestry's journey to London
articles.description: The 950-year-old work will be as safe "as a baby" during its move to London, French officials say.
